description_long: This is a detailed bust sculpture of an elderly man with a prominent, furrowed brow, deep-set eyes, and a full, textured beard and mustache. The hair is intricately sculpted, with visible waves and curls, and the facial features are expressive, conveying a sense of contemplation or intensity. The bust is mounted on a rectangular plinth, which provides a stable base and elevates the figure. The surface of the sculpture appears matte and slightly rough, suggesting it is made from plaster or marble. The back of the head is less detailed, with the focus clearly on the front and sides. The overall coloration is a uniform off-white, typical of classical or academic busts.
description: A highly detailed, off-white bust of an elderly bearded man with expressive features, mounted on a rectangular plinth. The sculpture has a matte, slightly rough surface and intricate hair and facial details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the intense facial expression, deep-set eyes, and detailed beard and mustache.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the nose, cheekbone, and the textured hair and beard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with less detail and the broad base of the plinth.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ear, sideburns, and the flowing hair and beard from a different angle.
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the sculpture could be suited for display in a museum, gallery, or public urban space.
